title_en: Israel continues to commit genocide, atrocity crimes by deliberately targeting Palestinian children, UN independent commission finds
excerpt_en: Israeli authorities and security forces have deliberately targeted Palestinian children, resulting in genocide and atrocity crimes in the Gaza Strip and war crimes in the West Bank, a UN independent commission of inquiry said in its latest report released on Tuesday.

title_en: ‘Better future for Syria remains within reach,’ UN Security Council hears
excerpt_en: Syria has emerged after more than a decade of crisis with “clear signs of progress”, but acute needs remain and efforts must boost support so the country can “move from survival towards recovery”, UN officials told the Security Council on Monday.

excerpt_en: After another deadly night of clashes in Lebanon, aid agencies issued a new alert for Gaza, where 265 Palestinian children have been killed since a ceasefire was announced in October 2025.

title_en: UN upholds freedom of movement for peacekeepers in Lebanon

title_en: Security Council LIVE: Gaza in the spotlight as dire conditions continue
excerpt_en: The Security Council debated conditions in Gaza at the request of its 10 elected members amid concern that the territory's humanitarian crisis is being overshadowed by wider regional developments. The meeting took place under a ceasefire that has existed in name since October 2025 – but nearly 1,000 Palestinians have been killed, and most Gazans remain displaced. title_en: US-Iran deal: technical work can begin, says atomic energy agency

title_en: UN officials call for urgent action in Yemen to push peace, reduce hunger

title_en: While world waits for details on Iran-US accord, UN calls for Hormuz aid corridor
excerpt_en: As representatives of Iran and the United States reportedly prepared to sign a new peace agreement at the end of the week, the UN on Monday stressed the urgent need to open an aid corridor to transit the choked-off Strait of Hormuz and prevent a global hunger crisis.
